scoring_scale.0: Hallucination — fabricated info not in memory
scoring_scale.1: Relevant but wrong — context correct but key info error
scoring_scale.2: Core correct but detail error — main fact right, partial errors
scoring_scale.3: Perfect match — all key info accurate
